About

I'm a Python Flask web developer finishing my MCA, focused on building responsive, secure and scalable applications. My work spans backend development, database integration, authentication, and REST APIs — with an eye for writing code that stays maintainable as a project grows.

Alongside development, I completed an AWS Cloud internship where I got hands-on with real infrastructure — provisioning compute, managing storage and access, load-balancing traffic, and pointing custom domains at production apps.

AWS Cloud Internship

2025
Cloud Infrastructure — Hands-on Training

Worked directly with core AWS services to provision and secure cloud infrastructure: launching and managing EC2 instances, storing objects in S3, distributing traffic through an Application Load Balancer, and controlling access with IAM. Built custom AMIs for repeatable deployments, issued certificates with ACM for HTTPS, and pointed a GoDaddy domain at the live infrastructure.
